commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=112020560f7c9a739df3738f3122de19c68a9d31)
commands.review_summary:
The PR exposes an optional Feishu runtime getter and changes several Feishu inbound/comment/dedup call sites to use null guards when the plugin runtime store is uninitialized.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +4. Total +27 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: with `channelRuntime` supplied but the global Feishu runtime store empty, the PR can pass the earlier optional checks and still throw in `createFeishuReplyDispatcher()` before sending the reply. I did not run a live Feishu account, so this is source-reproducible rather than live-reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because the PR has a blocking code defect and insufficient real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not treat this external PR as an automated repair lane yet.

target.title: #92595: fix(feishu): handle uninitialized runtime gracefully on inbound messages
target.author: qingminglong
